common.dragDrop: Drag & drop your file here, or click to browse

home.hero: Everything You Need to Work with PDF Files — Instantly
home.heroSub: Upload or drag & drop your file, and we'll auto-detect its type and suggest the right tools — edit, convert, compress, and more. No registration required.
home.uploadCta: Drag your file here or click to browse
home.uploadOr: Supported: PDF, Word, JPG, PNG, WebP, MP4 — Max size: 200 MB.
home.uploadSubtitle: We generate a quick preview and instantly show matching tools.
home.editNowTooltip: Open the file editor — edit text, add comments, and modify pages
home.suggestedToolsDesc: After uploading, we automatically show compatible tools: text editing, highlighting, merge/split, compress, convert to Word/image, video to GIF, and more.
home.unsupportedFile: This file type is not supported. Try PDF, Word, images, or video.
home.featuresTitle: A smarter way to convert and edit online
home.feature1Desc: Edit, convert, compress, merge, split without switching tabs.
home.feature2Desc: Get pixel-perfect, editable files in seconds with zero quality loss.
home.feature3Desc: Access files securely, protected by automatic encryption.

pdfToWord.title: PDF to Word
pdfToWord.description: Convert PDF files to editable Word documents online for free.

wordToPdf.title: Word to PDF
wordToPdf.description: Convert Word documents (DOC, DOCX) to PDF format online for free.

compressPdf.title: Compress PDF
compressPdf.description: Reduce PDF file size while maintaining quality. Choose your compression level.

imageConvert.title: Image Converter
imageConvert.description: Convert images between JPG, PNG, and WebP formats instantly.

videoToGif.title: Video to GIF
videoToGif.description: Create animated GIFs from video clips. Customize start time, duration, and quality.

wordCounter.title: Word Counter
wordCounter.description: Count words, characters, sentences, and paragraphs in your text instantly.
wordCounter.placeholder: Type or paste your text here...

textCleaner.title: Text Cleaner
textCleaner.description: Remove extra spaces, convert text case, and clean up your text instantly.

mergePdf.title: Merge PDF
mergePdf.description: Combine multiple PDF files into a single document. Free and fast.

splitPdf.title: Split PDF
splitPdf.description: Split a PDF into individual pages or extract specific page ranges.
splitPdf.allPagesDesc: Extract every page as a separate PDF file
splitPdf.selectPagesDesc: Extract only specific pages or ranges

errors.requiredPages: Please enter page numbers or ranges (e.g. 1,3,5-8).
errors.outOfRange: Selected pages ({{selected}}) are out of range. This PDF has only {{total}} page(s).
errors.invalidFormat: Invalid page format: {{tokens}}. Use a format like 1,3,5-8.
errors.noPagesSelected: No pages selected. This PDF has {{total}} page(s).

rotatePdf.title: Rotate PDF
rotatePdf.description: Rotate all pages of a PDF by 90°, 180°, or 270° degrees.

pdfToImages.title: PDF to Images
pdfToImages.description: Convert each page of a PDF into high-quality images (PNG or JPG).

imagesToPdf.title: Images to PDF
imagesToPdf.description: Combine multiple images into a single PDF document.

watermarkPdf.title: Watermark PDF
watermarkPdf.description: Add a custom text watermark to every page of your PDF.

protectPdf.title: Protect PDF
protectPdf.description: Add password protection to your PDF to prevent unauthorized access.

unlockPdf.title: Unlock PDF
unlockPdf.description: Remove password protection from your PDF file.

pageNumbers.title: Add Page Numbers
pageNumbers.description: Add page numbers to every page of your PDF. Choose position and starting number.

pdfEditor.title: Advanced PDF Editor
pdfEditor.description: Edit PDF text, add comments, reorder pages, and save a final copy. Fast, simple, and right in your browser.
pdfEditor.intro: Here you can edit your PDF directly in the browser: add text, comments, highlights, freehand drawing, delete/add pages, and export a new copy without altering the original.

steps.step1: Add elements (text, highlight, drawing, note) using the toolbar at the top.
steps.step2: Click Save to save a new copy (a new version is created — the original file is not replaced).
steps.step3: Click Download to get the final copy, or choose Share to copy the download link.

pdfEditor.saveTooltip: Save a new copy of the file
pdfEditor.versionNote: We save a new copy each time you save changes — the original file is never modified. You can revert to previous versions from the file page. Temporary files are automatically deleted after 30 minutes if the process is not completed.
pdfEditor.privacyNote: Your files are protected — we perform security checks before processing and use encrypted connections (HTTPS). See our Privacy Policy for more details.
pdfEditor.preparingPreviewSub: This may take a few seconds depending on file size.
pdfEditor.applyingChangesSub: Don't close the window — a new file will be created when done.
pdfEditor.savedSuccess: Changes saved successfully — you can now download the file.
pdfEditor.processingFailed: Failed to process the file. Try re-uploading or try again later.
pdfEditor.fileTooLarge: File size exceeds the limit (200MB). Please reduce the file size and try again.

pdfFlowchart.title: PDF to Flowchart
pdfFlowchart.description: Extract procedures from PDF documents and convert them into interactive flowcharts automatically.
pdfFlowchart.uploadDesc: Upload your PDF document to extract procedures
pdfFlowchart.dragDropHint: or drag and drop your PDF file here
pdfFlowchart.trySampleDesc: Try our sample document to see the tool in action
pdfFlowchart.extractingDesc: We are scanning your PDF and identifying procedures
pdfFlowchart.noProcedures: No procedures were detected in this document. Try a different PDF.
pdfFlowchart.selectProceduresDesc: Choose which procedures to convert into flowcharts
pdfFlowchart.generatingDesc: Creating visual flowcharts from selected procedures
pdfFlowchart.flowReadyDesc: Your flowcharts have been generated successfully
pdfFlowchart.manualDesc: Specify a page range and create a custom procedure
pdfFlowchart.noPageContent: No content available for this page
pdfFlowchart.chatWelcome: Hi! I can help you improve the flowchart "{{title}}". Ask me anything about the flow structure, suggest improvements, or request simplifications.
pdfFlowchart.chatError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
pdfFlowchart.chatSuggestion1: How can I simplify this flow?

result.downloadReady: Your file is ready for download.
